seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Loch Lomond and Lockhart River. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Loch Lomond vs Lockhart River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Loch Lomond and Lockhart River.
heading: Loch Lomond vs Lockhart River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Loch Lomond, Queensland and Lockhart River, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lockhart River has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Loch Lomond (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Loch Lomond or Lockhart River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Loch Lomond has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Lockhart River scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Loch Lomond scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Lockhart River scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Loch Lomond or Lockhart River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lockhart River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
